prompt: Create an ultra-detailed high fantasy cinematic illustration of the Serpent Queen, a regal pale-skinned queen with very long flowing silver-white hair, wearing a jeweled gold crown and an ornate translucent deep crimson gown covered in intricate gold filigree, chains, scales, embroidery, and layered sheer fabric. She stands in a powerful contrapposto pose in the foreground, looking slightly upward and to the left with a calm imperious expression, one leg visible through a high slit, gold jewelry wrapping her arms and legs. Beside her is exactly 1 enormous white serpent, coiled in the lower right foreground with its raised head near her waist, pearl-like scales, golden ornamental harness details, and a poised protective expression. Behind them are exactly 3 prominent armored royal guards in white-and-gold plate armor with helmets and capes: 1 central guard directly behind the serpent, 1 guard to the right, and 1 partially visible guard to the left. Include exactly 3 prominent crimson royal banners with gold eagle-like emblems, flowing in the wind: 1 large banner on the right, 1 mid-distance banner on the left, and 1 smaller banner farther left. Set the scene before a vast luminous white Gothic cathedral-palace with towering spires, arches, carved stone, balconies, and ceremonial grandeur. The atmosphere is bright daylight with soft haze, windblown hair and fabric, drifting red flower petals, pale stone courtyard, and a sense of imperial procession. Style: highly polished fantasy concept art, ornate baroque detail, realistic anatomy, ethereal lighting, ivory and gold palette contrasted with crimson, dramatic low-angle composition, sharp foreground detail, grand scale, no text, no watermark, no modern objects.
promptEn: Create an ultra-detailed high fantasy cinematic illustration of the Serpent Queen, a regal pale-skinned queen with very long flowing silver-white hair, wearing a jeweled gold crown and an ornate translucent deep crimson gown covered in intricate gold filigree, chains, scales, embroidery, and layered sheer fabric. She stands in a powerful contrapposto pose in the foreground, looking slightly upward and to the left with a calm imperious expression, one leg visible through a high slit, gold jewelry wrapping her arms and legs. Beside her is exactly 1 enormous white serpent, coiled in the lower right foreground with its raised head near her waist, pearl-like scales, golden ornamental harness details, and a poised protective expression. Behind them are exactly 3 prominent armored royal guards in white-and-gold plate armor with helmets and capes: 1 central guard directly behind the serpent, 1 guard to the right, and 1 partially visible guard to the left. Include exactly 3 prominent crimson royal banners with gold eagle-like emblems, flowing in the wind: 1 large banner on the right, 1 mid-distance banner on the left, and 1 smaller banner farther left. Set the scene before a vast luminous white Gothic cathedral-palace with towering spires, arches, carved stone, balconies, and ceremonial grandeur. The atmosphere is bright daylight with soft haze, windblown hair and fabric, drifting red flower petals, pale stone courtyard, and a sense of imperial procession. Style: highly polished fantasy concept art, ornate baroque detail, realistic anatomy, ethereal lighting, ivory and gold palette contrasted with crimson, dramatic low-angle composition, sharp foreground detail, grand scale, no text, no watermark, no modern objects.
promptZh: 创作一张超精细的高级奇幻电影感插画，主角是 蛇女王，一位皮肤苍白、拥有极长飘逸 银白色头发 的威严女王，头戴镶嵌珠宝的金冠，身穿华丽的半透明 深红色 礼服，礼服上覆盖着精致的金丝镶边、链条、鳞片、刺绣和层叠的薄纱。她以强有力的对立式平衡姿势站在前景，神情平静而傲慢，微微向左上方凝视，高开叉裙摆露出一条腿，手臂和腿上缠绕着金饰。她身旁是 1 条巨大的白蛇，盘绕在右下角前景，抬起的头部靠近她的腰部，拥有珍珠般的鳞片、金色的装饰性挽具细节，神态从容且具有保护性。在她们身后是 3 名显眼的皇家卫兵，身穿白金相间的板甲，佩戴头盔和披风：1 名卫兵位于蛇的正后方，1 名卫兵在右侧，1 名卫兵在左侧部分可见。画面中包含 3 面显眼的深红色皇家旗帜，上面绘有金色鹰形徽章，在风中飘扬：右侧 1 面大旗，左侧中景 1 面旗帜，左侧更远处 1 面较小的旗帜。场景设定在一座宏伟明亮的 白色哥特式大教堂宫殿 前，拥有高耸的尖塔、拱门、雕刻石材、阳台和庄严的仪式感。氛围为明亮的日光，带有柔和的薄雾，头发和衣物随风飘动，飘落的红色花瓣，苍白的石制庭院，营造出一种帝国游行的宏大感。风格：高度精炼的奇幻概念艺术，华丽的巴洛克细节，写实的解剖结构，空灵的灯光，象牙色与金色的色调与深红色形成对比，戏剧性的低角度构图，清晰的前景细节，宏大的规模，无文字，无水印，无现代物体。
